_meta.purpose: Single source of truth for pages/support/flake8-guide.html. Drives a single-card / sections-within layout via render_flake8_guide.py.
_meta.notes: Critical-error code examples include lc-syn-* syntax-highlight spans inline within problem_html/fix_html (preserved verbatim from the original page).

overview.label: Overview
overview.body_html:
Flake8 is a code style checker that runs automatically when you submit to CodeGrade. It checks your Python code against PEP 8 — the official Python style guide used by professional developers worldwide.

These aren’t just suggestions — they’re part of your Code Style grade. Clean code is professional code. See the Rubrics section on Grading Info for how Code Style factors into your overall lab grade.

readingErrors.label: Reading Errors
readingErrors.errorFormat_html: lab-1-1.py:12:5: E302 expected 2 blank lines, found 1

anatomy.label: Filename
anatomy.desc: Which file the error is in

errors.title: Module Imported But Unused
errors.intro_html: You imported something but never used it. Remove the import!
errors.problem_html:
import math
# math is never used!
print("Hello")
errors.fix_html:
# Removed unused import
print("Hello")

errors.title: Variable Assigned But Never Used
errors.intro_html: You created a variable but never did anything with it.
errors.problem_html:
result = 5 + 3
# result is never printed or used!

rows.fix: Put 2 blank lines before every function definition
Never have more than 2 consecutive blank lines
Keep lines under 79 characters; break long strings across multiple lines
Remove invisible spaces at the end of lines (VS Code can do this automatically)
Use exactly 4 spaces per level — never mix tabs and spaces

quickFixes.label: Quick Fixes
quickFixes.intro_html: Run through this list before every submission:
items_html: 2 blank lines before each function definition
4 spaces for each indentation level (not tabs)
No trailing whitespace at the end of lines
All variables you created are actually used
All imports at the top are actually needed
